ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-06-2012 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-23-2012 Continued To Nov-06-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-29-2012 Off Calendar

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Aug-29-2012 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-18-2012 Continued To Aug-29-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Justin Macneil for Cami Craig (Administrator).

The Court stated that a status report was filed but that a Petition to Approve the Status Report and Continue Administration of the Estate was needed, and that it needs to be verified by the Administrator. Ms. Macneil requested a 60-day continuance. Status on filing of a Petition for Final Distribution or filing of a Petition to Approve the Status Report was continued to August 29, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy W. Weatherly.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jul-18-2012 Continued To Aug-29-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-06-2012 Continued To Jul-18-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Administrator has failed to meet the 18-month limit for petitioning for final distribution of the Estate or filing of a Report of Status Of Administration. An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator and the Attorney to appear on July 18, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they have not complied. Today's status hearing was also continued to that date.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-02-2010 Granted Per Written Order
